name: Hot Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken wings in half at the joints.
2. Heat oil to 360°F (180°C) in a large frying pan or skillet.
3. Add the chicken wings and fry until crisp, about 12-15 minutes.
4. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C). Spread the cooked wings out on a baking sheet in one layer and bake for 45 minutes.
5. To make the sauce, combine hot sauce or Tabasco with melted butter and mix well.
6. Once the chicken wings are cooked through, drizzle with the sauce and serve immediately.
Serves 2-6
Nathalie Dupree's "New Southern Cooking"
